speaker: speaker2
text: It ’ s nice to meet you , too .

speaker: speaker1
text: I am happy to be speaking to a presidential candidate .

speaker: speaker2
text: Would you like to ask me anything ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you feel about gay marriage ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think everyone has the right to love who they want .

speaker: speaker1
text: Many people won ’ t like that .

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m sure they won ’ t , but that ’ s my view on gay marriage .
